creator: billf@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Patch applied. Sort of. 

In your patch the second master site wasn't commented out, which is the 
case with what's in the repository. Please see my commit message at 
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/sysutils/asmon/Makefile for 
how I resolved this.
